subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath revealed the verses in truth, and before them the Bayán, that all who dwell in the heavens and on earth may be made ready [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق و من قبلها البیان لیستعد من فی السموات و الارض
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @suffering and imprisonment
